$comment: WTP-PA platform pillars + positions, encoded for keyword matching against PA bills. Source: https://www.wtpppa.org/platform — keep in sync when the website changes. Each position has 'keywords' (lowercase substrings matched against bill title + summary) and a 'stance' indicating the direction WTP-PA takes (support / oppose) on legislation that matches.

pillars.name: Community Outreach
pillars.tagline: Strengthening community ties and civic participation

positions.title: School choice and parental voice in curriculum
positions.summary: School choice in struggling districts; stronger parental voice in curriculum decisions.

positions.title: Community-led addiction recovery over punishment
positions.summary: Legalization and recovery programs over punishment.

positions.title: Justice system reform and community policing
positions.summary: Mental health support, skills training, reintegration programs, community policing that builds trust, youth intervention.

positions.title: Elder care and volunteer-driven community programs
positions.summary: Elder care initiatives with community volunteer efforts; volunteer programs for before/after-school support.

pillars.name: Health & The Environment
pillars.tagline: A clean, healthy, and free society

positions.title: Medical freedom and bodily autonomy
positions.summary: Individual liberty in personal health choices; opposition to vaccine mandates and water fluoridation.

positions.title: Remove pharma/chemical industry liability shields
positions.summary: Remove liability protections for pharmaceutical, biological, and chemical industries.

positions.title: Access to alternative medicine and practitioners
positions.summary: Access to alternative medicine and health practices; address conflicts of interest in biomedical publishing.

positions.title: Hold polluters accountable
positions.summary: Corporations bear costs of pollution and environmental damage; cleanup of contaminated sites.

positions.title: Regenerative farming and food sovereignty
positions.summary: Support regenerative farming practices; oppose toxic chemicals and industrial farming practices.

positions.title: Preserve parks, rivers, lakes, forests, and open lands
positions.summary: Preservation of natural lands and waterways.

pillars.name: Constitutional Integrity
pillars.tagline: Defending civil liberties and government accountability

positions.title: Free speech and freedom of association
positions.summary: Defense of rights to free speech, free association, freedom of religion.

positions.title: Right to keep and bear arms
positions.summary: Defense of the right to keep and bear arms.

positions.title: Protection from unreasonable search and seizure
positions.summary: Fourth Amendment protections; civil asset forfeiture reform implied.

positions.title: Nonpartisan judiciary, jury nullification, open courts
positions.summary: Judicial reform to remove partisanship; support for jury nullification; open recording of court proceedings.

positions.title: Government transparency, including blockchain pilots
positions.summary: Transparency via independent review boards and blockchain technology.

positions.title: Civics education and youth government internships
positions.summary: Civics education emphasis and government internships for youth.

positions.title: Prevent foreign ownership of land and critical assets
positions.summary: Prevent foreign ownership of U.S. land and critical assets.

positions.title: End foreign entanglements; protect PA soldiers
positions.summary: End foreign entanglements; state protection of soldiers from undeclared wars.

positions.title: Secure borders, humane immigration
positions.summary: Tall fences, wide gates: secure borders and fair, humane immigration policy.

positions.title: Overturn Citizens United; campaign finance reform
positions.summary: Stop money influx corrupting electoral processes.

positions.title: Ballot access reform; oppose lawfare
positions.summary: Make it easier for third parties and independents on the ballot; prevent politically-motivated prosecutions.

positions.title: Voter identification for electoral integrity
positions.summary: Require voter ID at the polls.

positions.title: End gerrymandering
positions.summary: Eliminate partisan redistricting.

positions.title: Open primaries — all eligible voters in all elections
positions.summary: Allow all eligible voters in primary elections regardless of party registration.

positions.title: Majority-vote winner selection
positions.summary: Winners must achieve a majority — implies ranked-choice or runoff.

positions.title: Term and employment limits for officials
positions.summary: Term limits and employment limits across all government members.

positions.title: Ban securities trading by officials in office
positions.summary: Prohibit securities trading while in office.

positions.title: End pensions and special privileges for officials
positions.summary: End pensions and special privileges for elected officials.

positions.title: Five-year lobbying ban after leaving office
positions.summary: Five-year revolving-door ban for former officials.

positions.title: Affordable housing and accessible homeownership
positions.summary: Affordable housing initiatives for accessible homeownership.

positions.title: Eliminate restrictive zoning and land-use laws
positions.summary: Eliminate unconstitutional zoning and land-use laws.

positions.title: Property tax reform; lower working-class burden
positions.summary: Property tax reform and reduced working-class tax burden.

positions.title: Simplify income and corporate tax codes
positions.summary: Simplified income and corporate tax codes.

positions.title: Break up corporate monopolies; reform licensure
positions.summary: Break up corporate monopolies; re-evaluate licensure regulations.

positions.title: Free-market economy with minimal intervention
positions.summary: Free-market economy minimizing government intervention.

positions.title: Increased child and dependent care tax credit
positions.summary: Increased child and dependent care tax credit.

positions.title: Vocational training and apprenticeships
positions.summary: Support vocational training and apprenticeships as viable paths.
